title: calicotome villosa subsp. grosii
intro: Calicotome villosa subsp. grosii is a subspecies of the Calicotome villosa plant, which is a type of shrub native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various digestive issues, such as dyspepsia and gastritis, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been found to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, providing several health benefits, including the protection of the cardiovascular system and the improvement of immune function. Herbal preparations of Calicotome villosa subsp. grosii, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and benefits.
